status_messages.what_was_done: Profiled 250×3 dataset. Found 1 numeric cols. LLM suggested 0 feature groups.
status_messages.what_was_not_done: Did not sample sub-populations or run hypothesis tests for distribution differences.
status_messages.doubts: Suggested groups are based on column names; actual feature buildability depends on data quality. Mean skewness=0.0.

topic.rationale: Topical separation is the main clustering goal.

sentiment.rationale: Secondary signal that may further separate clusters.

status_messages.what_was_done: Vectorized 250 documents from column 'text' into a 100-dim embedding matrix using tfidf_svd.
status_messages.what_was_not_done: Did not perform topic modeling or named-entity extraction; per-cluster distinctive terms are computed at labelling time.

status_messages.what_was_done: Used KMeans with k=5 (auto-selected via silhouette). Ran deepening loop → 5 leaf clusters. Silhouette=0.0271 (low (typical for transaction ratio features)).
status_messages.what_was_not_done: Did not try all algorithm variants simultaneously.
issues: Silhouette=0.027 < 0.15 — clusters overlap; interpretability may be low. Consider reviewing feature selection or k.

status_messages.what_was_done: Named 5 clusters using LLM (tone='easy'). Clarity Gate PASSED. Avg confidence=8.0/10.
status_messages.what_was_not_done: Did not validate that description text references specific numbers (only checked confidence and name uniqueness).

status_messages.what_was_done: Trained random_forest, 5-fold stratified CV. CV macro-F1=0.692 ≥ 0.6 threshold.
status_messages.doubts: Lowest-F1 personas: Topic cluster 1(0.63), Topic cluster 4(0.67), Topic cluster 2(0.68)

llm_queries.purpose: suggest feature engineering groups from schema + business purpose
select text embedding method for clustering
select classifier model based on dataset characteristics
